settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update everything you set up during enrollment.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Enter your admin email and password to manage your family's assistant.
login.demoNote: Mockup: any email and password works.

dashboard.title: How {{name}} did this {{range}}.
dashboard.subtitle: Quick read of activity, skill use, and remaining quota.

household.title: Who Ari knows.
household.subtitle: Edit family members. Removed members lose WhatsApp access immediately on save.
household.familyNameHint: How Ari refers to your family.

assistant.title: Name, vibe, languages.
assistant.subtitle: What your family calls Ari and how it sounds out of the box.
assistant.name: Assistant name
assistant.languagesHint: Pick one or both. Each member's language preference takes priority.

whatsapp.title: Who's connected.
whatsapp.subtitle: Toggle WhatsApp delivery per family member.

email.title: AgentMail address & forwarding.
email.subtitle: The private inbox where Gmail forwarding lands.
email.forwardingDesc: If you turn this off, Ari stops triaging until forwarding is re-enabled.

skills.title: What Ari can do.
skills.subtitle: Toggle capabilities. Disabled skills stop running immediately on save.
skills.emailTriageDesc: Reads, classifies, and summarizes incoming email.
skills.weatherDesc: Morning weather brief and severe-weather alerts.
skills.ocrDesc: Reads photographed receipts, bills, school notices.
skills.browserDesc: Logs into sites, downloads statements, fills forms.
skills.calendarDesc: Reads your shared calendar; reminds the right person.

rules.title: What matters in your inbox.
rules.subtitle: Triage rules tuned to your family.
rules.urgent: Pull urgent-keyword emails to the top

routines.title: Scheduled nudges.
routines.subtitle: Toggle the daily and event-based check-ins.
routines.morningCheckinDesc: Daily 8am: weather, today's calendar, anything urgent overnight.
routines.afternoonPauseDesc: Daily 3pm: a single deliberate prompt to step away from the screen.
routines.birthdayRemindersDesc: Morning-of nudges for the people you list.

personality.title: How Ari speaks.
personality.subtitle: Optional seeds. Read every session — they shape the assistant's voice.
personality.assistantSoulHint: Default soul is loaded if you leave this blank.
personality.voiceNotesHint: Helps Ari match each person's tone.

plan.title: Your plan.
plan.subtitle: Plans, quotas, and billing — mockup only for now.
plan.billingMockup: Mockup — no real card on file.
plan.resetDemoDesc: Wipes your local edits and restores the seeded Villalobos household.
